name: Fruit Wheel
author: Poki
description: Fruit Wheel brings the classic watermelon and Suika game to a new level! Aim carefully and shoot various items from the center to the wheel. Watch as two identical items meet and merge into something bigger and better! Start with delicious food items and unlock exciting new levels featuring fish, animals, and more. Use magnets to attract similar items together for epic combinations. How many levels can you unlock? How to play Fruit Wheel? Move the item with the mouse and click to shoot it! Who created Fruit Wheel? Fruit Wheel is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Tag , Tag 2 , Stickman Bike , wall-jumper and Hockey Stars ! How can I play Fruit Wheel for free? You can play Fruit Wheel for free on Poki. Can I play Fruit Wheel on mobile devices and desktop? Fruit Wheel can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
